architecture_summary: Introduce a repository-local read-only governed symbolic loop contract as a Foundation Mode design gate and admit it to the holistic loop read model without granting runtime registration, execution authority, connector authority, deployment claims, or terminal closure.
data_model_changes: add a read-only governed symbolic loop contract payload with canonical phases, action classes, guard booleans, deterministic kernel boundaries, read-model registry admission state, runtime-registration denial, receipt envelope, rollback plan, next action, and evidence references
admit the loop to the holistic read-model registry only; do not add runtime state, external effects, tenant records, connector records, filesystem authority, or deployment state
rollback_plan: Remove the governed symbolic loop read-model registry manifest, admission dossier, schema, example, validator, tests, and SDLC evidence artifacts, then rerun focused validator tests, SDLC artifact validation, holistic loop freeze validation, and workspace governance preflight before claiming rollback closure.
migration_plan: No runtime migration is required because this design admits only a read-model registry manifest and repository-local contract; it does not register a runtime loop, mutate persistent state, create public endpoints, or grant authority.
